name: Raspberry Cream
recipeIngredient: Cream (enough to make 1 pint, or 2 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the raspberries through a fine sieve and add enough cream to make 1 pint (2 1/2 cups).
2. Heat the cream and raspberry puree until just below boiling point.
3. Beat together the egg yolks, sugar, mace, and orange-flower water in a bowl.
4. Pour the cream and raspberry mixture into the egg mixture in a thin stream while continuously beating to ensure smoothness.
5. Cook the mixture over simmering water in the top of a double boiler until it thickens enough to coat a spoon.
6. Remove from heat, pour into a serving bowl, and chill before serving.
